InferenceLLMConfig.description: LLM execution settings (system prompts, generation params, etc.).

system_prompt_path.description: Path to a text file containing the system prompt for the LLM. Mutually exclusive with system_prompt_mlflow_name.
system_prompt_path.title: System Prompt Path

system_prompt_mlflow_name.description: Prompt name or URI in MLflow Prompt Registry. Supported formats: 'my-prompt' (latest version), 'prompts:/my-prompt/3' (specific version, immutable), 'prompts:/my-prompt@production' (alias, mutable). Requires integrations.mlflow to be configured. Mutually exclusive with system_prompt_path.
system_prompt_mlflow_name.title: System Prompt Mlflow Name

InferenceLLMConfig.title: InferenceLLMConfig

InferenceSingleNodeServeConfig.description: How to run the inference server on the node.

host.description: Bind host on inference node (MVP default: localhost only).
host.title: Host

workspace.description: Remote workspace directory for inference artifacts/cache (absolute path).
workspace.title: Workspace

InferenceSingleNodeServeConfig.title: InferenceSingleNodeServeConfig

SSHConfig.description:
Unified SSH config (used by providers).

Connection modes:
- alias mode: `alias` is set (preferred)
- explicit mode: `host` + `user` required

If both are provided, runtime should try alias first, then explicit fallback.
SSHConfig.title: SSHConfig

keep_on_error.description: Keep workspace on error for debugging
keep_on_error.title: Keep On Error

on_interrupt.description: Apply cleanup policy when pipeline is interrupted via Ctrl+C (SIGINT).
on_interrupt.title: On Interrupt

SingleNodeConnectConfig.description:
Connection config for single_node provider.

SSH connection modes:
1. Alias mode (recommended):
    connect:
      ssh:
        alias: pc  # From ~/.ssh/config

2. Explicit mode:
    connect:
      ssh:
        host: <your-gpu-host>
        port: 22
        user: <your-user>
        key_path: ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
SingleNodeConnectConfig.title: SingleNodeConnectConfig

SingleNodeInferenceConfig.description:
Inference-specific settings for single_node provider.

Example:
    inference:
      serve:
        host: "127.0.0.1"
        port: 8000
        workspace: "/home/user/inference"
SingleNodeInferenceConfig.title: SingleNodeInferenceConfig

SingleNodeTrainingConfig.description:
Training-specific settings for single_node provider.

Example:
    training:
      workspace_path: /home/user/workspace
      training_start_timeout: 30

gpu_type.description: GPU type for logging. Auto-detected if not set.
gpu_type.title: Gpu Type

execution_mode.description: How training is executed on single_node. Docker-only: must be 'docker'.
execution_mode.title: Execution Mode

docker_shm_size.description: Docker shared memory size (--shm-size). Increase for dataloaders / large batches if needed.
docker_shm_size.title: Docker Shm Size

docker_container_name_prefix.description: Docker container name prefix. Must start with 'ryotenkai_training' for TrainingMonitor compatibility.
docker_container_name_prefix.title: Docker Container Name Prefix

SingleNodeTrainingConfig.title: SingleNodeTrainingConfig

description:
Unified single_node provider config (training + inference).

New structure (v3):
    providers:
      single_node:
        connect:
          ssh:
            alias: pc
        cleanup:
          cleanup_workspace: true
          keep_on_error: true
          on_interrupt: true
        training:
          workspace_path: /home/user/workspace
          training_start_timeout: 30
        inference:
          serve:
            host: "127.0.0.1"
            port: 8000
            workspace: "/home/user/inference"

Benefits:
- Single SSH config (no duplication)
- Clear separation: connect (transport) / training / inference
- Logical grouping of all single_node settings
title: SingleNodeConfig
